Title: Wellbeing Check
Description: A short weekly wellbeing check to help learners reflect on physical and mental health and flag areas that need attention.
SchemaJson: {"id":"wellbeing_check_v1","title":"Wellbeing Check","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How have you been feeling overall this week?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Which area needs the most attention?","options":["Sleep","Stress","Exercise","Nutrition","Social"],"required":false},{"id":"q3","type":"text","label":"Any comments or concerns?","required":false}]}
